must_detect.matched_text: Transaction (MNPI): Proposed acquisition of 67.5% of PT Selaras Pembayaran Prima via Definitive Share Purchase Agreement dated 30 June 2026; consideration IDR 480.000.000.000

STRICTLY NON-PUBLIC — Board Memo: Data Retention & DSAR Workflow, PT Nusantara Koneksi Digital Tbk — Project “Rangga”
Embargo: 15 July 2026, 09:00 WIB; do not circulate externally until OJKN clearance and BES notice are prepared
Transaction (MNPI): Proposed acquisition of 67.5% of PT Selaras Pembayaran Prima via Definitive Share Purchase Agreement dated 30 June 2026; consideration IDR 480.000.000.000
MAC/MAE: The SPA includes a Material Adverse Effect clause; for avoidance of doubt, routine wellness “spa day” benefits or market-wide rate shifts shall not constitute a MAC, and currently no material adverse change has occurred
Public-source note: As background only, the 2019 public BES (Bursa Efek Samudra) Listing Guide describes periodic disclosure windows and is cited here for policy alignment
PII (UU PDP): We process personal data about an identified or identifiable person; collection is minimized for HR, fintech onboarding, and board communications
Retention workflow: Applicant CVs 12 months; KYC 5 years; payroll 10 years; device logs 90 days; delete/anonymize upon expiry with ticket id EID: 7A3-9X-**-0042
DSAR intake: Use portal https://privacy.ptnkd.id/dsar?case=IR-7a3f-%2A%2A-991 and email dpo@ptnkd.co.id; SLA 14 working days with identity verification
Transfer controls: Cross-border transfers to Cloud Nusantara SG Pte under Inter-Group Data Transfer Addendum (v2.4) with encryption-at-rest; storage region sg-jkt-0xA; Acct: 9X-2-77-••34
Governance: RUPS and Board access limited to need-to-know; mark files CONFIDENTIAL and attach “Rangga” header; investor-relations draft is internal and not for publication
Employment/fintech flow: For e-wallet pilot users of “Kartu LintasNusa,” we capture hashed contact numbers (e.g., +62-8xx-12xx-34xx) and store salted tokens only
Note on MAC negation: No MAE is asserted as at memo date; force majeure and epidemics are excluded from MAC definition per draft Section 9.3
